name: Harvest-Time Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic meatballs and set aside.
2. Melt the margarine in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic, thyme leaves, mushrooms, and zucchini to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes.
4. Add the cooked meatballs; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with salt and cheese. Add the tomato wedges. Cover and heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
